_note: This schema uses the human-friendly format (name, options as array, updateSemantics, tags). The API also accepts the native format (propertyName, options as string, update as boolean). Both are auto-normalized on save.
name: Employee Properties
description: Properties for tracking internal team members. Combines HR system data (role, department, start date) with AI-extracted insights from 1:1 notes, standups, Slack messages, performance reviews, and internal communications. Designed for people teams, managers, and internal communication tools.

properties.name: First Name
properties.description: The employee's first/given name. Populated from HR system (HRIS, Workday, BambooHR).

properties.name: Last Name
properties.description: The employee's last/family name. Populated from HR system.

properties.name: Full Name
properties.description: The employee's full display name. Populated from HR system or concatenated from first + last name.

properties.name: Role / Title
properties.description: The employee's official job title. Populated from HR system. This is the formal title, not a colloquial description of their work.

properties.name: Department
properties.description: The employee's primary department or function. Populated from HR system. If the employee sits across multiple departments, use the one they report into.

properties.name: Manager
properties.description: The name of the employee's direct manager. Populated from HR system. Format: 'Full Name' (e.g., 'Sarah Chen').

properties.name: Location
properties.description: The employee's primary work location. Populated from HR system. Format: 'City, State/Country' (e.g., 'New York, NY' or 'London, UK').

properties.name: Start Date
properties.description: The employee's first day at the company. Populated from HR system. ISO 8601 format. Used to calculate tenure and trigger onboarding/milestone communications.

properties.name: Work Arrangement
properties.description: The employee's work arrangement. Populated from HR system or team records.

properties.name: Tenure Band
properties.description: The employee's tenure bracket, derived from their start date. Can be auto-computed or populated from HR system. Used for segmenting communications — new hires need different messaging than veterans.

properties.name: Skills & Expertise
properties.description: Technical and professional skills the employee has demonstrated or mentioned. AI extracts from 1:1 notes ('I've been learning Rust'), project updates ('led the Kubernetes migration'), Slack messages, and performance reviews. Each entry is a specific skill or domain (e.g., 'Kubernetes', 'data modeling', 'public speaking', 'React Native').

properties.name: Current Projects
properties.description: Projects or initiatives the employee is actively working on. AI extracts from standups, project updates, 1:1 notes, and team channels. Each entry is a concise project name or description (e.g., 'API v2 migration', 'Q1 marketing campaign', 'customer onboarding redesign'). Replaces with current set — old projects are dropped.

properties.name: Career Goals
properties.description: The employee's stated career aspirations and development goals. AI extracts from 1:1 notes, performance reviews, and development conversations (e.g., 'wants to move into a management role', 'interested in transitioning to product', 'working toward staff engineer'). Updated when new goals are expressed — captures the most current aspiration.

properties.name: Recognition & Wins
properties.description: Accomplishments, kudos, and notable achievements. AI extracts from Slack shoutouts, performance reviews, standup highlights, and manager notes. Each entry is a concise description of the win (e.g., 'shipped payment integration 2 weeks early', 'closed largest deal in Q4', 'led successful incident response for production outage').

properties.name: Feedback Themes
properties.description: Recurring patterns and themes from feedback — both given and received. AI extracts from survey responses, 1:1 notes, 360 reviews, and retrospectives. Each entry is a theme (e.g., 'wants more cross-team collaboration', 'requests clearer priorities', 'strong mentoring ability', 'struggles with deadline estimation'). Includes both strengths and growth areas.

properties.name: Engagement Signals
properties.description: AI-assessed summary of the employee's engagement and morale based on communication patterns. Considers: participation in meetings, Slack activity, enthusiasm in 1:1s, voluntary contributions, and any explicit statements about job satisfaction. This is a narrative assessment, not a score — e.g., 'Highly engaged — proactively volunteering for new initiatives and mentoring junior team members' or 'Showing signs of disengagement — declining optional meetings, shorter responses in 1:1s'.

properties.name: Flight Risk
properties.description: Whether the employee shows signs of potential departure. AI infers from: declining engagement patterns, expressions of frustration or burnout, mentions of external opportunities, reduced participation in long-term planning, or explicit statements about considering leaving. True = signals detected. False = no concerning signals. Sensitive — should be visible only to direct managers and HR.

properties.name: Performance Trend
properties.description: The employee's performance trajectory based on recent review data and AI-observed patterns. Exceeding = consistently above expectations. Meeting = delivering as expected. Below = underperforming or struggling. New = too early to assess (typically < 3 months). AI infers from review notes, project outcomes, and manager feedback.
